category_sources: Official generated documentation identifies LunarDate as The Chinese Lunar Date Library.
display_name_sources: Official docs website field points to lunar-date.zhcn.cc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the repository documentation fallback.
Official generated API documentation at lunar-date.zhcn.cc lists classes, functions, constants, dependencies, version, website, and source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already set to https://github.com/yetist/lunar-date; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include javascript, python, c, date, vala, and lunar.
Official documentation describes a Chinese Lunar Date Library with C headers and GLib/GObject dependencies.
